name: ASStateSnapshot
brief_description: Resource that captures and restores the state of an ASComponent.
description: ASStateSnapshot is a high-level data container used for networking (replication, rollback) and gameplay persistence (save systems). It encapsulates all attribute base values, active tags, and the state of active effects (remaining time, stacks) of an [ASComponent] at an exact point in time (tick).

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Dictionary mapping attribute names (StringName) to their base values (float).

properties.name: tags
properties.description: List of all active tags at the time of capture.

properties.name: tick
properties.description: The simulation tick number when this snapshot was captured.

methods.name: apply_to_component
methods.description: Restores the state stored in this snapshot to the provided [ASComponent].

methods.name: capture_from_component
methods.description: Captures the current state (attributes and tags) from the provided [ASComponent] into this resource.
